holdings.infoBox: ONEV is an equity ETF with a total of 443 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cardinal Health stock at 1.80%, Humana at 1.26%, Flex Ltd. at 1.04%, Jabil at 0.93%, and Arch Capital Group at 0.91%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Russell 1000 Low Volatility Focus ETF (ONEV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index of large-cap stocks from the Russell 1000 Index, selected and weighted by four factors that are scaled by market cap. ONEV was launched on Dec 2, 2015 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: Russell 1000 Low Volatility Focused Factor Index
